mapper.select: select * from logistics_carrier_connection where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId} limit 1
select * from logistics_carrier_connection where connection_code = #{connectionCode} limit 1
select * from logistics_agg56_connection where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId} limit 1
mapper.update: update logistics_carrier_connection set connection_name = #{carrierName}, api_base_url = #{apiBaseUrl}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId}
update logistics_carrier_connection set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId}
update logistics_carrier_connection set display_order = #{displayOrder}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId}

update logistics_carrier_connection set credential_status = #{credentialStatus}, last_authorized_time = case when #{credentialStatus} = 'CONFIGURED' then sysdate() else last_authorized_time end, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId}
update logistics_carrier_connection set last_channel_sync_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId}
mapper.insert: insert into logistics_agg56_connection( carrier_account_id, connection_code, app_token_mask, app_key_mask, app_token_ciphertext, app_key_ciphertext, credential_key_id, agg56_user_id, agg56_user_account_mask, agg56_customer_code, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{carrierAccountId}, #{connectionCode}, #{appTokenMask}, #{appKeyMask}, #{appTokenCiphertext}, #{appKeyCiphertext}, #{credentialKeyId}, #{agg56UserId}, #{agg56UserAccountMask}, #{agg56CustomerCode}, sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update app_token_mask = values(app_token_mask), app_key_mask = values(app_key_mask), app_token_ciphertext = values(app_token_ciphertext), app_key_ciphertext = values(app_key_ciphertext), credential_key_id = values(credential_key_id), agg56_user_id = values(agg56_user_id), agg56_user_account_mask = values(agg56_user_account_mask), agg56_customer_code = values(agg56_customer_code), update_time = sysdate()

insert into logistics_carrier_channel_candidate( carrier_account_id, connection_code, external_channel_code, external_channel_name, raw_final_carrier_text, status, sync_batch_id, source_payload_json, source_payload_hash, first_seen_time, last_seen_time, update_time ) values ( #{carrierAccountId}, #{connectionCode}, #{externalChannelCode}, #{externalChannelName}, #{rawFinalCarrierText}, #{status}, #{syncBatchId}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, #{sourcePayloadHash}, sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate() ) on duplicate key update external_channel_name = values(external_channel_name), raw_final_carrier_text = values(raw_final_carrier_text), status = values(status), sync_batch_id = values(sync_batch_id), source_payload_json = values(source_payload_json), source_payload_hash = values(source_payload_hash), last_seen_time = sysdate(), update_time = sysdate()
mapper.select: select * from logistics_system_channel where system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode} limit 1
mapper.update: update logistics_system_channel set system_channel_name = #{systemChannelName}, standard_carrier_code = #{standardCarrierCode}, status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate(), remark = #{remark} where system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode}
mapper.select: select * from logistics_carrier_channel_mapping where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId} order by create_time desc, mapping_id desc
select * from logistics_carrier_channel_mapping where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId} and system_channel_code = #{systemChannelCode} and status = 'ENABLED' order by mapping_id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update logistics_label_order set provider_order_no = #{providerOrderNo}, status = #{status}, label_file_types = #{labelFileTypes}, zone_code = #{zoneCode}, charge_weight = #{chargeWeight}, logistics_error = #{logisticsError}, provider_result_json = #{providerResultJson}, last_fetched_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where label_order_id = #{labelOrderId}
update logistics_label_order set status = #{status}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where label_order_id = #{labelOrderId}
mapper.select: select * from logistics_label_order where business_order_no = #{businessOrderNo} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into logistics_label_package( label_order_id, provider_package_no, tracking_number, label_url, file_type, status, source_payload_json, create_time ) values ( #{labelOrderId}, #{providerPackageNo}, #{trackingNumber}, #{labelUrl}, #{fileType}, #{status}, #{sourcePayloadJson}, sysdate() )
mapper.select: select * from logistics_label_package where label_order_id = #{labelOrderId} order by label_package_id asc
select * from logistics_carrier_request_log where carrier_account_id = #{carrierAccountId} order by request_time desc, request_log_id desc
